reviewed_findings.reason: Not affected. Debian marks CVE-2023-45853 <ignored> for bookworm: the vulnerable contrib/minizip code is not built into the shipped zlib1g binary (no fixed package is coming, so the prior 'until the sidecar base image moves to a fixed distro package' exit condition was unreachable). The OpenFN sidecar Rust crate has no zlib/zip dependency and zlib1g is only a transitive node:24-bookworm-slim package, so MiniZip is never reached. Suppression retained to keep grype quiet; re-review when the sidecar base image leaves Debian bookworm.
